mapper.insert: insert into soultalk.dia_main(user_id, is_user, sentence, time) values (#{userId}, #{isUser}, #{sentence}, #{time})
mapper.delete: delete from soultalk.dia_main where user_id = #{userId} order by time desc limit #{index},1
mapper.select: select * from soultalk.dia_main where user_id = #{userId} order by time desc
